allocation.emptyDescription: Real AP, inventory, and tax allocation controls are not shown until the controlled allocation contract is implemented.

audit.documentDescription: Status, payment, AP, inventory, and attachment warnings stay visible before legal actions.
audit.draftDescription: Vendor, line, warehouse, tax, AP, and attachment warnings remain visible before saving.
audit.title: Audit & Warnings

charges.emptyDescription: Use Add Charge or Add Discount to apply a whole-invoice charge (e.g. freight/landed cost) or discount. Each posts to its own GL account and adjusts the bill totals.
charges.emptyReadOnly: This bill has no whole-invoice charges or discounts.

modal.accountHint: Defaults from Purchase Settings. Charge debits this account; discount credits it.

errors.createAndPostFailed: Failed to create and post purchase invoice.
errors.poLoadFailed: Failed to load purchase order lines.

invoiceDetail.excelNotConnected: Purchase invoice line export is not connected yet.

footer.draftSaved: Saved draft. Use Edit Draft to modify.

invoiceDetail.imageNotConnected: Purchase invoice image reading is not connected yet.

pendingApproval.body1: This invoice was submitted and is waiting for accounting to approve the ledger effect.

rail.helpDraft: Select or hover over an item line to review purchasing details, warehouse, tax, and AP impact.
rail.helpView: Review the vendor bill, stock cost, tax, AP balance, and legal posting actions from this view.
rail.itemFocusNote: Select a header warehouse before posting stock items on a direct purchase invoice.
rail.itemFocusNoteWithWarehouse: This line receives into {{warehouse}} unless the source document already fixed the warehouse.
rail.readinessPolicyActive: AP, inventory, and approval policy active
rail.vendorFocusNote: Vendor focus controls AP settlement, payment terms, currency, and purchase history.
rail.vendorFocusSubtitle: Vendor bill and AP account context
rail.warehouseFocusNote: For direct purchase invoices, this header warehouse is applied to stock lines that do not come from a purchase order.

attachments.unsavedHelp: Files selected here are queued locally and uploaded automatically when the invoice is saved.

unpost.confirmMessage: This will reverse all accounting and inventory entries posted for this invoice. The action is auditable but cannot be undone in place. Continue?

poDetail.lineUnitPriceNonNegative: Line {{lineNum}}: unit price must be greater than or equal to 0.

purchaseSettings.title: Purchase Settings

descriptions.procurementPolicy: Define which purchasing documents users can work with and how operational controls behave.
descriptions.accountDefaults: Standard general ledger accounts used for purchasing transactions.
descriptions.documentNumbering: Prefixes and sequence counters for purchase documents.

messages.defaultAPRequired: Default Accounts Payable account is required.
messages.defaultGRNIRequired: Default GRNI account is required for perpetual purchasing workflows.

GoodsReceiptDetailPage.ifPOIsProvidedLinesArePreFilled: If PO is provided, lines are pre-filled from open stock lines using server-side rules.

PurchaseHomePage.manageVendorsTrackPurchaseOrdersAndRecei: Manage vendors, track purchase orders and receipts, and process vendor invoices.

PurchaseReturnDetailPage.latestPostedInvoicesChooseOneToPullLines: Latest posted invoices. Choose one to pull lines into this return.

PurchasesAnalyticsPage.purchaseSpendByVendorOrItem: Purchase spend by vendor or item

PurchaseSettingsPage.perpetualAccountingRequiresTheOperationa: Perpetual accounting requires the operational workflow because Goods Receipts create inventory accounting.
PurchaseSettingsPage.invoiceVendorsWithoutAPrecedingPOGRN: Invoice vendors without a preceding PO/GRN.
PurchaseSettingsPage.forceStockItemProcurementToStartFromA: Force stock-item procurement to start from a Purchase Order.
PurchaseSettingsPage.simpleWorkflowAutomaticallyEnablesDirect: Simple workflow automatically enables direct invoicing and hides Purchase Orders and Goods Receipts from end users.
PurchaseSettingsPage.whenOnAPaymentMayExceedTheInvoice: When on, a payment may exceed the invoice total. The extra becomes a credit on the vendor's account (their AP balance goes negative) and offsets their future bills.
PurchaseSettingsPage.whenOnSameVendorSameCurrencyPriceMemory: When on, same-vendor same-currency price memory can convert between item UOMs. It never converts across currencies.
PurchaseSettingsPage.selectExpenseFallbackForNonStockItems: Select expense fallback for non-stock items
PurchaseSettingsPage.optionalFallbackForServiceAndNonStockPos: Optional fallback for service and non-stock posting.
PurchaseSettingsPage.requiredForPerpetualReceiptAccrualPostin: Required for perpetual receipt accrual posting.
PurchaseSettingsPage.usedForPostingSupplierExchangeDifference: Used for posting supplier exchange differences.
PurchaseSettingsPage.purchasePostingFollowsTheInventoryAccoun: Purchase posting follows the inventory accounting mode chosen during inventory setup. Perpetual mode requires GRNI for receipt accruals.
PurchaseSettingsPage.basePoliciesAreDerivedFromYourActiveWork: Base policies are derived from your active workflow mode. Use governance rules below to override these defaults.
PurchaseSettingsPage.specificRulesThatChangeTheBasePolicyBeha: Specific rules that change the base policy behavior.
PurchaseSettingsPage.noOverrideRulesDefinedBasePolicyAppliesT: No override rules defined. Base policy applies to all documents.

VendorStatementPage.noPostedVendorActivityInThisPeriod: No posted vendor activity in this period.
VendorStatementPage.showsOpenPurchaseOrdersSeparatelyForProc: Shows open purchase orders separately for procurement follow-up. These amounts do not affect the vendor statement balance.
VendorStatementPage.postedAPStatementAndLedgerForAVendor: Posted AP statement and ledger for a vendor

PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.configureHowPurchaseTransactionsPostToYo: Configure how purchase transactions post to your General Ledger. This setup links your procurement workflows to the appropriate GL accounts.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.accountMappingsCanBeChangedLaterFromPurc: Account mappings can be changed later from Purchase Settings, but all purchase transactions will use whatever mappings are active at posting time.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.selectTheGLAccountsThatPurchaseTransacti: Select the GL accounts that purchase transactions will post to.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.primaryVendorLiabilityAccountUsedForAllP: Primary vendor liability account. Used for all purchase invoicing.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.optionalFallbackForNonStockOrServicePurc: Optional fallback for non-stock or service purchases when an item account is not set.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.requiredForPerpetualModeGoodsReceiptsCre: Required for perpetual mode. Goods Receipts credit this account before the Purchase Invoice clears it.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.gRNIIsNotRequiredInPeriodicModePurchase: GRNI is not required in periodic mode. Purchase Invoices create the accounting effect directly.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.usedForPostingSupplierExchangeRateDiffer: Used for posting supplier exchange rate differences.
PurchaseFinancialIntegrationWizard.theseMappingsTakeEffectImmediatelyForAll: These mappings take effect immediately for all future purchase transactions.

PurchaseInitializationWizard.configureYourPurchasingWorkflowAndAccoun: Configure your purchasing workflow and accounting defaults before creating supplier transactions.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.chooseBetweenInvoiceOnlySimplicityAndAFu: Choose between invoice-only simplicity and a full operational flow.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.setAPOptionalExpenseFallbackAndGRNIWhen: Set AP, optional expense fallback, and GRNI when perpetual accounting is enabled.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.configurePrefixesAndDefaultPaymentTermsF: Configure prefixes and default payment terms for purchase documents.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.workflowControlsWhichPurchaseDocumentsUs: Workflow controls which purchase documents users see. Accounting mode is inherited from Inventory.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.showInvoicesAndReturnsOnlyPurchaseOrders: Show invoices and returns only. Purchase Orders and Goods Receipts stay hidden.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.exposePurchaseOrdersAndGoodsReceiptsAlon: Expose Purchase Orders and Goods Receipts alongside invoices and returns.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.perpetualAccountingRequiresTheOperationa: Perpetual accounting requires the operational workflow because Goods Receipts create inventory accounting.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.allowVendorInvoicesWithoutAPurchaseOrder: Allow vendor invoices without a Purchase Order or Goods Receipt path.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.requirePurchaseOrdersForStockItems: Require Purchase Orders for Stock Items
PurchaseInitializationWizard.forceStockItemProcurementToStartFromA: Force stock-item procurement to start from a Purchase Order.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.simpleWorkflowAutomaticallyEnablesDirect: Simple workflow automatically enables direct invoicing and hides Purchase Orders and Goods Receipts from end users.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.purchaseOperationsWillTrackDocumentsAndQ: Purchase operations will track documents and quantities but will NOT create financial/GL postings.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.toEnableFinancialImpactActivateTheAccoun: To enable financial impact, activate the Accounting module from Company Admin → Modules, then complete the Accounting setup.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.accountMappingAPGRNIExpenseAccountsWillB: Account mapping (AP, GRNI, expense accounts) will be configured when Accounting is enabled. You can set these later from Purchase Settings.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.requiredPurchasePostingAccountsMustBeCon: Required purchase posting accounts must be configured before initialization.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.primaryVendorLiabilityAccountUsuallyAcco: Primary vendor liability account. Usually Accounts Payable.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.selectExpenseAccountForNonStockPurchases: Select expense account for non-stock purchases
PurchaseInitializationWizard.optionalFallbackUsedForNonStockOrService: Optional fallback used for non-stock or service purchases when an item/category account is not set.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.requiredInPerpetualModeGoodsReceiptsCred: Required in perpetual mode. Goods Receipts credit this account before the Purchase Invoice clears it.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.goodsReceiptsStayOperationalOnlyPurchase: Goods Receipts stay operational only. Purchase Invoices create the accounting effect.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.setDefaultPaymentTermsAndDocumentPrefixe: Set default payment terms and document prefixes.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.pickWhichPurchaseDocumentTypesToInstallE: Pick which purchase document types to install. Each type comes with one or more default form variants — you'll activate or customize them next.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.theSystemCatalogHasNoPurchaseTemplatesYe: The system catalog has no Purchase templates yet. Contact your administrator.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.theseInstallAsLockedInactiveDefaultTempl: These install as locked, inactive default templates.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.theSchemasAreAvailableImmediatelyButNoSi: The schemas are available immediately, but no sidebar entries appear until you open
PurchaseInitializationWizard.aDefaultFormToUseItAsIs: a default form to use it as-is, or
PurchaseInitializationWizard.itToCreateAnEditableVariant: it to create an editable variant.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.reviewTheConfigurationBelowAndInitialize: Review the configuration below and initialize the Purchases module.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.accountingIsNotEnabledThisInitialization: Accounting is not enabled. This initialization will set up purchase operations only — no financial/GL postings will be created.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.noneSelectedYouCanAddThemLaterFrom: None selected. You can add them later from Settings.
PurchaseInitializationWizard.variantsWillInstallAsLockedDefaults: variants will install as locked defaults
PurchaseInitializationWizard.setWorkflowAccountingDefaultsAndNumberin: Set workflow, accounting defaults, and numbering for procurement.
